title: Peaceful Gathering
description: makes mob drops more reliable in peaceful mode
body:
this datapack makes it so that hostile mob drops are still reliable to get in peaceful difficulty

here are ways to get certain mob drops:
- string: put 3 grass in a crafting table/ put wool in a stone cutter
- rotten flesh: 8 meat items with a bucket of water in the crafting table
- ghast tears: [redacted]
- blaze rods: smelt glowstone blocks in a blast furnace
- bones: putting a bone block in a stonecutter
- spider eyes: now dropped by bees
- gunpowder: combine blaze powder and basalt
- slimeballs: combine lime dye and clay

based of a different pack ive played (cant remember which one) ive added a feature to get xp reliably by blasting the dragon egg for a mc day or 2

(note: this datapack will automatically set your world into hard dificulty and sets a gamerule to no monsters to make it so you can still get hunger)
